name: The Links Lounge
about: The Links Lounge is a golf simulator venue in Orem, Utah, featuring TrackMan-powered technology in two fully immersive simulator bays. The facility provides a premium environment for game improvement, offering advanced swing data and access to hundreds of world-class courses. Pricing is flexible with options for 2-hour sessions at $55 and various membership tiers, including individual, group, and corporate plans, making it suitable for both casual players and serious golfers seeking year-round practice opportunities.
why_golfers_like_it: TrackMan technology provides precise swing data for game improvement
Two immersive simulator bays offer a premium golfing experience
Social space with TVs and a pool table for a relaxed atmosphere
Flexible booking options including 2-hour sessions and memberships
Access to hundreds of world-class courses year-round
